name: Grape Sponge
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the gelatin stand in cold water until soft.
2. Dissolve in boiling water.
3. Add sugar and fruit juices, then chill until the mixture begins to set.
4. Beat until frothy.
5. Whisk in the stiffly beaten egg whites and beat the mixture until almost firm.
6. Fold in the whipped cream.
7. Pile into sherbet glasses.
8. Garnish with whipped cream topped with a candied violet or sprinkled with mauve trimmings.
Makes 10 to 12 servings.
